texto: From the RBI side, the fake Indian currency note is an important issue that needed to be addressed. The other collateral benefits from this, in terms of greater accountability, better public finance, more transparency, are, by definition, areas that take time to fully play out.
explicacao: Citação de Urjit Patel sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “From the RBI side, the fake Indian currency note is an important issue that needed to be addresse…” articula tempo, time, accountability em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como accountability e fake.
